reasoning: For the first date (Nov 16, 2025), FIDE rankings update strictly on the 1st of every month, meaning Wikipedia's November Top 100 list will remain identical to the Nov 9 list (p=0.97). As of November 1, Wesley So is ranked #8 (2764). However, the rating gap is highly asymmetric: he is 4 points behind #7 Praggnanandhaa, but only 1 point ahead of #9 Gukesh (2763) and 2 points ahead of #10 Firouzja (2762). Because of this narrow margin and the presence of highly active young players directly beneath him (such as Gukesh playing the World Championship in late November), So is more likely to be overtaken than to advance. Consequently, for December 9, I estimate a 43% chance he maintains a rank of 8 or better. For February 7, as the forecast horizon extends and uncertainty naturally increases, the estimate reverts slightly toward the baseline of 0.47.
